---
title: "Foundation Stack"
pagetitle: "Foundation Stack"
description: "52-week structured series on adolescent PPCS aerobic exercise prescription — PMID-backed tables, methods, and clinical SOPs."
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/2026-*/index.qmd"
  sort: "week asc"
  type: table
  fields: [week, date, title, pillar, pmid_count, audience]
  field-display-names:
    week: Week
    date: Published
    title: Title
    pillar: Pillar
    pmid_count: PMIDs
    audience: Audience
  feed: true
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.fs-hero}
## Foundation Stack

**52 weeks · one topic · four pillars**

Long-form, citable knowledge on **adolescent PPCS aerobic prescription** — for clinicians, researchers, and families. Hosted at **fs.guanglab.org** as a dedicated public series (separate from personal site tools and any private research operations).

**Progress:** **1 / 52** published · Next: Week 2 (scheduled)
:::

## Why this series exists

In the AI era, short posts disappear; **depth with citations compounds**. Weekly installments build PMID-supported tables and SOPs so this URL becomes the reference surface for the niche — portable for citation, teaching, and long-term portfolio evidence.

::: {.callout-note}
**Not a blog roll.** Shared template and metadata (`pillar`, `pmid_count`, `audience`, `week`). Table below = canonical index; **RSS enabled**.
:::

## Four pillars

| Pillar | Code | What you get |
|--------|------|----------------|
| **Top-journal reproduction** | `reproduce` | Audit landmark RCTs: dose reported vs dose performed |
| **Methods comparison** | `methods` | Adherence vs outcome measurement; coding rules |
| **Synthetic experiments** | `synth` | Priors, dashboards, dose–heterogeneity experiments |
| **Pitfalls & SOP** | `sop` | Checklists for AT/PT; plain-language notes for parents |

## Fixed article structure (every week)

1. **Problem** · 2. **Comparison table** · 3. **Disagreements** · 4. **Methods** · 5. **SOP** · 6. **Limitations**

## Published installments

## Public companion links (non-confidential)

- **Author home:** [guanglab.org](https://guanglab.org/)  
- **PPCS SR overview (public page):** [guanglab.org/ppcs-sr](https://guanglab.org/ppcs-sr/)  
- **Open analysis figures:** [guanglab.org/labs/data/ppcs-sr](https://guanglab.org/labs/data/ppcs-sr/)  
- **Pilot gap summary (this site):** [Measurement audit summary](/resources/pilot-measurement-summary.html)

---

[About this series](/about.html)
